Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI

Class CLIDrawBufferTable

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
CLIDrawBuffer
public class CLIDrawBufferTable extends Object implements CLIDrawBuffer
Buffer for the CLI that draws and prints the cards of the draw table

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBuffer

    COD_COLOUR, COVERED_HEIGHT, COVERED_LENGTH, DELTA_BACKS, HEIGHT_CARD, LENGTH_CARD, SPACE

  • Constructor Details

    • CLIDrawBufferTable

      public CLIDrawBufferTable(List<CliCard> repcards)
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      repcards - the list of all the cards in form of CliCards given by the CLI

  • Method Details

    • extractCardfromIndex

      public List<String> extractCardfromIndex(int index, boolean side)
      Method to transform the integer value, the index, that travels in the network in the graphical and printable way, a list of strings
      Specified by:
      extractCardfromIndex in interface CLIDrawBuffer
      Parameters:
      index - the integer value corresponding to a exact card
      side - a boolean that represents the side of the card wanted by the player
      Returns:
      a list of strings, the representation of the card

    • extractCardfromColour

      public List<String> extractCardfromColour(CardColour colour)
      Method to transform the enumeration value, the colour, that travels in the network, in the graphical and printable way, a list of strings
      Parameters:
      colour - the colour of the card to print on its back
      Returns:
      a list of strings, the representation of the card

    • printBuffer

      public void printBuffer()
      Method used to print the buffer in the CLI
      Specified by:
      printBuffer in interface CLIDrawBuffer

    • insertCardInBuffer

      public void insertCardInBuffer(int index, int position)
      It replaces the cards drawn or moved with the new cards to represent on the public card place
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the card to insert
      position - the index that represents the place where to insert the card

    • insertCardInDeck

      public void insertCardInDeck(int position, CardColour colour)
      It replaces the top of the deck chosen with the back of a coloured card
      Parameters:
      position - the index which represents the deck where to replace the top
      colour - the colour of the card to insert on top of the chosen deck
